# RPG World

> A premium Dungeons & Dragons 5e character management platform focused on performance, modern design, and clean architecture.

## 📝 Overview
**RPG World** is a modern web application for tabletop RPG players. It provides a streamlined interface to create, manage, and evolve D&D 5e characters, ensuring all rules and calculations are strictly followed while maintaining a beautiful, glassmorphism-inspired aesthetic.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (React 19)
- **Language**: TypeScript (Strict typing)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4 with a dynamic color proxy system.
- **Backend & Auth**: Supabase (PostgreSQL, SSR Auth, Storage).
- **Internationalization**: Full support for English and Portuguese (pt-BR) via `next-intl`.

## 🏗️ Technical Architecture
- **Clean Architecture**: Strict isolation between layers. Frontend communicates exclusively via the API layer.
- **Server-First Mindset**: Prioritizes Server Components and server-side Data Fetching for enhanced security and performance.
- **Design System**: Built on Tailwind v4 tokens, using semantic colors like `character-flare` and `character-surface`.

## ✨ Core Features
- Full character sheet management in a Single Page interface.
- Automatic calculations for Modifiers, Proficiency Bonus, and Passive Perception.
- Integrated Spellbook with automatic translation support.
- User account-based persistence.
